summary: Lane RL-001: Safe/Degraded Mode Architecture — Research & Design. Completed comprehensive cartography of the OpenCode desktop app initialization flow, identified 9 degradation points, designed a three-tier Safe/Degraded mode architecture with 6 implementation phases, and produced a structured design artifact at docs/json/opencode/plans/safe-degraded-mode-init.v1.json. Key findings: no existing degraded mode, sidecar is single point of failure, PGlite init has no error handling, InitStep needs extension from 3 to 6+ phases, MCP servers already have per-instance semaphore isolation but lack circuit breaker pattern, plugins have no quarantine mechanism. Recorded 3 cross-session lessons and 1 out-of-scope finding.
